V0905_01_00_00_0.text: No alien can escape the watchful eye of The Secrecy!

V0905_01_00_01_0.text: I didn't expect to Rush Duel at this moment.

V0905_01_00_02_0.text: Any alien who threatens the peace must answer to me!

V0905_01_00_03_0.text: The Secrecy's mission is to protect Earth at all costs!

V0905_01_00_04_0.text:
This is The Secrecy!
Surrender yourself!

V0905_01_00_05_0.text: With this Duel, I will learn everything about you!

V0905_01_00_06_0.text: Don't challenge me if you're not ready - for your own sake.

V0905_01_00_07_0.text: If this is the only way to earn your forgiveness, I accept.

V0905_01_00_08_0.text: Ranran may be my boss, but I will not go easy on her!

V0905_01_00_09_0.text: I don't want to fight you, Meowdestar...

V0905_01_00_10_0.text: I will do what I must - even if you are my partner.

V0905_01_00_11_0.text: Allow me to examine whether you deserve to be a leader!

V0905_03_00_00_0.text: I've analyzed and broken down your strategies!

V0905_03_00_01_0.text: My true strength will now rise like the flames!

V0905_03_00_04_0.text: You will never extinguish my fire!

V0905_03_00_05_0.text: Thinking you've already won will lead to your defeat!

V0905_05_00_00_0.text: Since you're giving it your all, I must respond in kind!

V0905_06_01_01_0.text: You must not think much of me!

V0905_07_09_00_0.text: Time for the card I Set!

V0905_07_09_01_0.text: I'll use the card I Set earlier!

V0905_10_00_00_0.text: Ready for a lesson in chemistry?

V0905_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0905_17_00_01_0.text: Show 'em that you're the one who's mightier!

V0905_17_00_02_0.text: Witness the results of my attack!

V0905_21_00_00_0.text: My interrogation will only become more thorough!

V0905_21_00_01_0.text: If you think you can win, your hypothesis is incorrect!

V0905_21_00_03_0.text: Everything is proceeding exactly as I expected.

V0905_21_00_04_0.text:
This can't be...
I must recheck my calculations!

V0905_21_00_05_0.text:
There's no way I've made a mistake!
No way at all! ...Right?

V0905_28_00_02_0.text: You must now do what you're told!

V0905_28_00_03_0.text: It was a tough Duel, but a win is a win!

V0905_28_00_04_0.text: You can't sneak your strategies past me!

V0905_28_00_05_0.text: I joined The Secrecy so that I could find you again.

V0905_28_00_06_0.text: A day will come when the whole galaxy will laugh and smile.

V0905_28_00_06_1.text: I hope I'll be around to see it...

V0905_28_00_07_0.text:
How's that, Velgearian!
No one outsmarts The Secrecy!

V0905_28_00_08_0.text: It wouldn't be right to just give you the win!

V0905_28_00_09_0.text: Power alone will never be enough to defeat me.

V0905_28_00_10_0.text: Learning from every defeat will lead you to success.

V0905_29_00_00_0.text: I guess I can turn a blind eye - just this once!

V0905_29_00_01_0.text:
Remember this!
You'll see me again if you cause any trouble!

V0905_29_00_02_0.text: I didn't have a clue what you were doing!

V0905_29_00_03_0.text: I have a bad habit of letting up when I'm sure I'll win...

V0905_29_00_04_0.text:
Ahhhh!
The cards in my Deck refuse to combo together!

V0905_29_00_05_0.text: There's no scientific reason why I should've lost this Duel!

V0905_29_00_06_0.text: This Duel made a mockery of my entire life!

V0905_29_00_07_0.text: Does it still count as a loss if I refuse to believe I lost?

V0905_29_00_10_0.text: Meowdestar knows every one of my strategies.

V0905_29_00_10_1.text: Because she and I are never apart.

V0905_29_00_11_0.text: If there's any way I can help, I'll be there for you.

V0905_33_00_00_0.text: My abilities are greater than infinity plus one!

V0905_33_00_01_0.text:
My hypothesis is that I will win.
But I must still prove it!

V0905_33_00_02_0.text: This is the equation for victory!

V0905_30_00_01_0.text: I have a squad of 80 Secrecy agents ready to arrest you!

V0905_30_00_02_0.text: Nothing can stop my monster's effect!

V0905_34_00_00_0.text: My investigation says that you have a monster in your hand.

V0905_34_00_01_0.text: If you refuse to Tribute, you're letting your monsters down!

V0905_34_00_02_0.text: I know exactly what you're planning to do!

V0905_34_00_03_0.text: The Sogetsu Style is the ultimate form of combat.

V0905_34_00_04_0.text: A threat like you must be sealed in our cryogenic vault.

V0905_34_00_05_0.text: Why are you bringing that up?

V0905_34_00_06_0.text: This is what I was waiting for!

V0905_34_00_08_0.text: I will punish you with... tickle torture!

V0905_34_00_09_0.text: A situation this dire requires extreme measures.

V0905_34_00_12_0.text:
Hee hee hee!
It's so nice to have such strong cards!

V0905_35_00_00_0.text: My investigation has led me here!

V0905_35_00_01_0.text: I'm Chief Maddox Sogetsu of The Secrecy!

V0905_36_00_00_0.text: We already know how this interrogation is going to go!

V0905_36_00_02_0.text: Our teamwork is more explosive than a chemical compound!

V0905_36_00_04_0.text: We still have a lot left in our tank!

V0905_36_00_05_0.text: I trust you to get this done!

V0905_08_00_00_0.text: The heat from these capsules will defend you!

V0905_08_00_00_1.text: I equip Chemicalizer Red on my Pyro-Type monster!

V0905_08_00_01_0.text: Time to take action with a chemical reaction!

V0905_08_00_01_1.text: I pair my monster with Chemicalize Structure Force!

V0905_08_00_02_0.text: Attack and defend with an alliance of science!

V0905_08_00_02_1.text: I pair my monster with Chemicalize Volshield!

V0905_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Fusionnnn!

V0905_08_00_04_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Maximum Flare Fusion!

V0905_08_00_05_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Volcalize Compound!

V0905_08_00_06_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Fiery Blaze!

V0905_08_00_07_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Scale of Flames!

V0905_08_00_08_0.text: I activate my Spell Card, Pierce!!

V0905_08_00_09_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Chemicalize Despise!

V0905_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Chemicalizer Wing!

V0905_08_00_11_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Phantom Bind!

V0905_08_00_12_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Firefall Wall!

V0905_09_01_01_0.text: I activate Volcalize Phoenix's third effect!

V0905_09_01_02_0.text: I activate Volcalize Phoenix's second effect!

V0905_09_01_03_1.text: It destroys your Spell or Trap Card!

V0905_09_00_12_0.text: James the Steam Swallow activates its effect!

V0905_09_00_14_0.text: I activate Seyanen the Blazing Conqueror's effect!

V0905_09_00_19_0.text: Hot the Combustible Fairy activates its effect!

V0905_09_00_20_0.text: Combustion Oni Bunsel activates its effect!

V0905_09_00_22_0.text: I activate Volt the Electrical Fairy's effect!

V0905_09_00_23_0.text: I activate Vande the Electric Lion's effect!

V0905_09_00_24_0.text: I activate Melt the Aqueous Fairy's effect!

V0905_09_00_30_0.text: I activate Flame Archer the Super Graphagas's effect!

V0905_09_00_31_0.text: I activate  Vapor Lancer the Super Graphagas's effect!

V0905_09_00_32_0.text: I activate  Ember the Hyper Assistant's effect!

V0905_09_00_33_0.text: I activate  Icelyn the Hyper Assistant's effect!

V0905_09_00_36_0.text: I activate Kappa Emperor River Slider's effect!

V0905_09_00_37_0.text: I activate Yamiruler the Dark Delayer's effect!

V0905_37_00_00_0.text: Emerge from the circles of lore to bring the flames of yore!

V0905_37_01_01_0.text: Transcend all knowledge and rise high to the sky!

V0905_37_00_02_0.text: Cold can only be so bold, but fire can always blaze higher!

V0905_37_00_03_0.text: Chemistry and alchemy join as one into a dragon of the sun!

V0905_37_00_04_0.text: Liquid and lightning merge for a combustible combination!

V0905_13_00_07_0.text: Here with a smile is Conductor Alchemicalizer Suirai!

V0905_37_00_05_0.text: From essence of combustion comes the azure of destruction!

V0905_13_00_09_0.text: Burst from the flames, Analyze Phlogiston!

V0905_37_00_06_0.text: Analyze once more to uncover the universe to its very core!

V0905_37_00_07_0.text: Like an unending flame, your victories will be sustained!

V0905_37_00_08_0.text: Tear the terrain and let the savage reign!

V0905_37_00_09_0.text: When she lowers the boom, you’ll meet your doom!

V0905_13_00_20_0.text: Melel the Enchanting Fire of the Lamp!

V0905_13_00_21_0.text: Alkyl the Flame Emperor of the Lamp!

V0905_13_00_22_0.text:
With the fire to inspire!
Ethyl the Fire Genie of the Lamp!

V0905_13_00_23_0.text:
You can't tame her flame!
Methyl the Fire Genie of the Lamp!

V0905_37_00_10_0.text: Research once more to bring the truth to the fore!

V0905_37_00_11_0.text: Charging its blade to slice all who gets in its way!

V0905_13_00_36_0.text:
Let's go!
Plasma Saber the Super Graphagas!

V0905_37_00_12_0.text: Strengthen your spear to strike with relentless fear!

V0905_13_00_37_0.text:
Let's go!
Vapor Lancer the Super Graphagas!

V0905_37_00_13_0.text: Even if a kappa can swim, it can get swept by the current.

V0905_37_00_13_1.text: And though I'm not talking about an electrical current...

V0905_37_00_13_2.text: Science has solved this formula when nature could not!

V0905_37_00_14_0.text: When the darkness threatens to overwhelm all that is just...

V0905_37_00_14_1.text: This general rises to stop it in its tracks!

V0905_13_00_44_0.text:
Come forth!
Yamiruler the Dark Delayer!

V0905_19_00_08_0.text: Sling your orb of radiant light!

V0905_19_00_20_0.text: Barrier Statue of the Inferno attacks!

V0905_27_00_01_0.text: No one's ever pushed me this hard...
